idea: Weekly surge in Google Trends searches for 'urgent home pest control' signals consumer stress lifting XLY
behavior: A sudden spike in urgent pest control searches indicates rising consumer stress and home maintenance urgency, often preceding discretionary spending rebounds.

market_impact.rationale: Increased home-related service searches correlate with discretionary consumer sector demand growth.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long XLY when 3-week moving average of 'urgent home pest control' search volume rises 25% above its 12-week average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 4 weeks or if the search volume drops below its 12-week average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Consumer stress-driven home service searches fluctuate often, creating multiple monthly signals.

idea: Daily jump in USGS earthquake activity intensity correlates with temporary selloff in infrastructure sector
behavior: Significant increases in local seismic activity cause short-term market nervousness around infrastructure and construction sectors.

market_impact.rationale: Increased earthquake activity raises fears of supply chain disruption and infrastructure repair costs.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLI when daily earthquake energy release index rises 30% above 7-day moving average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 3 trading days or when the index falls below its 7-day average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Earthquake activity frequently fluctuates daily, triggering reactive market sentiment.

idea: Weekly surge in Google Trends for 'DIY solar panel repair' signals green energy sector rebound
behavior: Rising searches for solar panel repairs suggest rising maintenance demand as consumers hold on to their green energy assets, signaling potential sector strength.

market_impact.rationale: Sustained interest in renewable energy maintenance indicates durable consumer investment in the energy sector.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long XLE when 2-week average search volume for 'DIY solar panel repair' rises 20% above 10-week average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 6 weeks or when the search volume falls below the 10-week average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Consumer interest in solar repairs spikes frequently due to seasonal maintenance cycles.

idea: Weekly Google Trends spike in 'trucker shortage' searches triggers bearish freight logistics sector
behavior: Rising concern over truck driver shortages signals imminent freight bottlenecks and cost pressures.

market_impact.rationale: Logistics companies face margin compression and delays from labor shortages.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLI when weekly searches for 'truck driver shortage' exceed 30% above 12-week average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 5 weeks or when search volume drops below 12-week average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Labor shortage narratives rise and fall regularly, producing frequent actionable signals.

idea: Daily spike in Google Trends for 'home air purifier repair' signals consumer stress rebound in discretionary sector
behavior: Increased repair searches for air purifiers indicate consumers prioritizing indoor air quality and discretionary spending on health-related home goods.

market_impact.rationale: Rising consumer spending on home comfort products lifts consumer discretionary stocks.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long XLY when daily search volume for 'air purifier repair' rises 40% above 7-day average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 7 trading days or when volume returns below 7-day average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Daily consumer health concerns cause frequent search volume spikes.

idea: Weekly increase in FRED series 'US Import Price Index' signals inflation pressure on materials sector

data.source: FRED API Import Price Index monthly data

behavior: Rising import prices reflect increasing input cost pressures that weigh on materials producers.

market_impact.rationale: Cost inflation compresses margins for basic materials companies.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLB when weekly import price index rises 1.5% above its 8-week moving average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 6 weeks or when index falls below 8-week average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Import price fluctuations are common and regularly prompt sector repricing.

idea: Weekly surge in RSS news count mentioning 'union contract dispute' triggers bearish financial sector

data.source: RSS feed count of labor union dispute news

behavior: Growing media attention on union disputes signals rising labor risk and uncertainty for financials exposed to unionized labor.

market_impact.rationale: Increased labor disputes raise operational risk and costs for financial institutions.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLF when weekly RSS count for 'union contract dispute' rises 50% above 12-week average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 4 weeks or when counts revert below 12-week average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Labor disputes flare regularly, generating multiple weekly news spikes.

idea: Daily spike in Google Trends for 'emergency plumbing repair' signals consumer stress rebound benefiting discretionary sector
behavior: Sharp increases in emergency plumbing searches indicate urgent home repair spending, lifting discretionary consumption.

market_impact.rationale: Consumer urgency on home repairs supports spending on home services and retail.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long XLY when daily search volume of 'emergency plumbing repair' rises 50% above 10-day average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 5 trading days or volume falls below 10-day average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Home emergencies drive frequent search spikes on a daily basis.

behavior: Rising searches on warehouse automation failures highlight operational bottlenecks and risks in supply chains.

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Warehouse automation issues are regularly reported, causing weekly interest spikes.

idea: Daily spike in FRED CPI Food at Home index signals inflation pressure in consumer staples sector

data.source: FRED API Consumer Price Index Food at Home daily interpolated

behavior: A sudden jump in food-at-home inflation pressures grocery and staple product margins.

market_impact.rationale: Rising input prices compress margins and reduce consumer disposable income for staples.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLP when daily CPI Food at Home index rises 0.2% above 5-day moving average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 7 trading days or when index reverts below 5-day average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Food inflation experiences frequent daily changes due to supply shocks.

behavior: Increased searches for heating failures reflect consumer stress and urgent repair demand impacting utilities.

behavior: Rising emergency vehicle repair searches indicate increased urgent spending and maintenance demand in industrial transportation.
